name: Snowmushroom Extract
description: A rare Chinese medicinal fungus with particles smaller than hyaluronic acid for superior skin penetration and hydration.
scientificSummary: A polysaccharide from snow mushroom forms particles significantly smaller than HA, enabling deeper dermal penetration.
mechanismOfAction: Nano-sized polysaccharide particles penetrate deeper than HA, while bioactive compounds reduce melanin production.

seo.title: Snow Mushroom Extract - Superior Hydrating Fungus | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Snow Mushroom Extract penetrates deeper than hyaluronic acid for lasting skin plumpness.
